alcohol.name: Alcohol
alcohol.shortDescription: Central nervous system depressant. Chronic use damages the liver, brain structures, and cardiovascular system.

nicotine.name: Nicotine
nicotine.shortDescription: Stimulant that activates nicotinic acetylcholine receptors. Damages the lungs, bronchi, and cardiovascular system through tobacco smoke.

cannabis.name: Cannabis
cannabis.shortDescription: Cannabinoid that acts on CB1 and CB2 receptors. Affects memory, cognition, and the brain's reward system.

cocaine.name: Cocaine
cocaine.shortDescription: Powerful stimulant that blocks dopamine reuptake. Damages the cardiovascular system and dopaminergic structures of the brain.
